heading: Susan L. Williams National Coral Reef Management Fellowship
label: 6481 Susan L. Williams National Coral Reef Management Fellowship

children.heading: Alaska Native Corporation
children.label: 1 Alaska Native Corporation
children.text: The term “Alaska Native Corporation” has the meaning given the term “Native Corporation” in .section 1602 of title 43

children.heading: Fellow
children.label: 2 Fellow
children.text: The term “fellow” means a National Coral Reef Management Fellow.

children.heading: Fellowship
children.label: 3 Fellowship
children.text: The term “fellowship” means the National Coral Reef Management Fellowship established in subsection (c).

children.heading: Covered Native entity
children.label: 4 Covered Native entity
children.text: The term “covered Native entity” has the meaning given the term in , as added by this division.section 6415 of this title

children.heading: Covered State
children.label: 5 Covered State
children.text: The term “covered State” has the meaning given the term in , as added by this division.section 6415 of this title

children.heading: Native entity
children.label: 6 Native entity
children.text: The term “Native entity” has the meaning given the term in , as added by this division.section 6415 of this title

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 7 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Commerce.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is established a National Coral Reef Management Fellowship Program.

children.label: A
children.text: to encourage future leaders of the United States to develop additional coral reef management capacity in States and local communities with coral reefs;

children.label: B
children.text: to provide management agencies of covered States and covered Native entities with highly qualified candidates whose education and work experience meet the specific needs of each covered State or covered Native entity; and

children.label: C
children.text: to provide fellows with professional experience in management of coastal and coral reef resources.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary, in consultation with the Secretary of the Interior, shall award a fellowship in accordance with this subsection.

children.heading: Term of fellowship
children.label: 2 Term of fellowship
children.text: A fellowship awarded under this subsection shall be for a term of not more than 2 years.

children.label: A
children.text: an intent to pursue a career in marine services and outstanding potential for such a career;

children.label: B
children.text: leadership potential, actual leadership experience, or both;

children.label: C
children.text: possession of a college or graduate degree in biological science, a college or graduate degree in resource management with experience that correlates with aptitude and interest for marine management, or both;

children.label: D
children.text: proficient writing and speaking skills; and

children.label: E
children.text: such other attributes as the Secretary, in consultation with the Secretary of the Interior, considers appropriate.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), the non-Federal share of the costs of a fellowship under this section shall be 25 percent of such costs.

children.heading: Waiver of matching requirement
children.label: 2 Waiver of matching requirement
children.text: The Secretary may waive the application of paragraph (1) to a fellowship if the Secretary finds that such waiver is necessary to support a project that the Secretary has identified as a high priority.
